name: OpenClaw Canon
description: Operational canon plugin with typed status, doctor, and preview-first memory and bounded sync fix tools plus bundled memory-hygiene and source-of-truth-fix skills.

stateFilePath.description: Optional path to the canon state JSON file. Defaults to ./.openclaw-canon-state.json in the current working directory.

memoryFilePath.description: Optional path to the memory snapshot JSONL file. Defaults to ./memory.jsonl in the current working directory.

repoReadmePath.description: Optional path to the repo README.md used for sync checks.

ciWorkflowPath.description: Optional path to the CI workflow that enumerates plugin packages.
